stemHtml: The flight crew receives a radiotelephony message from ATC containing information and instructions. How will each crew member react?

options.a: Each crew member will pay attention to and understand the same details of the message.
options.b: Each crew member will be able to recall the same details of the message.
options.c: Each crew member may perceive different details of the message, because perception is influenced by subjective factors.
options.d: Each crew member will perceive the same details of the message, if he/she pays attention and has the same level of experience as the other crew member.
